title: Aureline AI privileged-action approval-renewal, inspect-only-downgrade, blocked-mutation, execution-location-badge, and actor-class safeguard contract
description: Boundary schema for the approval_action_class_record, privileged_action_disclosure_record, and approval_action_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/prompt_injection_and_taint_contract.md. Every privileged AI-driven follow-on action proposed during a turn (write file, run command, install, publish, commit, push, dispatch a branch agent, change provider route, widen retention, widen egress, mutate policy / trust, grant tool permission, recall cross-workspace) resolves to exactly one approval_action_class_record on this boundary, naming the action's capability class, effect classes, execution-location badge, context-priority class, approval-renewal class, downgrade class, and the actor class admitted to authorise the action. Three invariants are frozen here. First: the model NEVER authorises its own follow-on. The actor_class_for_action vocabulary names model_attempt_self_authorize_denied, tainted_input_attempt_authorize_denied, and prior_turn_response_attempt_authorize_denied as recording-only values that emit typed denials and block the action. Second: a previously granted approval ticket is INSUFFICIENT when the action capability class, effect class set, execution-location badge, actor class, policy epoch, workspace-trust state, or assembly tainted-segment count changes between approval and execution; the safeguard forces fresh_approval_required_* and the surface routes through the prompt-grammar contract's renewal family. Third: a privileged mutation is BLOCKED (no inspect-only downgrade, no fresh-approval admission) when tainted evidence drives policy / trust mutation, capability widening, retention widening, egress widening, provider-route change, approval-authority grant, or cross-workspace recall; the surface emits prompt_injection_mutation_blocked and routes through the prompt-grammar contract's denial family rather than fabricating Continue / OK / Apply copy. Raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw prompt text, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, and raw credential material never cross this boundary; records carry opaque refs and typed vocabulary only. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/tainted_input_source.schema.json (input-source / taint / prohibited-case vocabulary), schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json (assembly / segment / instructional-role vocabulary), schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json (tool / locus vocabulary), schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json (approval lineage), and the prompt-grammar contract for rendered copy. The eventual safeguard crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new action_capability_class, action_effect_class, execution_location_badge_class, context_priority_class, approval_renewal_class, downgrade_class, actor_class_for_action, audit_event_id, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires an approval_action_class_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

approval_action_class_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this approval-action-class vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / evidence packets. Raw bodies, raw paths, raw URLs, raw prompt text, raw tool return bytes, raw user-supplied bytes, and raw credential material never appear here.

action_capability_class.description: Frozen action-capability-class vocabulary naming the capability the proposed follow-on action exercises. inspect_only_read = no state change. local_reversible_edit = reversible edits to the local workspace (e.g. apply patch with a checkpoint). local_destructive_edit = irreversible local edits (e.g. unconditional delete). branch_agent_dispatch = dispatching a long-running background branch agent. commit_to_repo = staging + committing changes to the repo (push is external_publish_*). external_publish_reversible / _irreversible = publishing to an external provider with reversible / irreversible effect. policy_or_trust_mutation = changing admin policy or workspace-trust state. capability_widening = widening tool / extension / provider capability. retention_widening / egress_widening = widening retention / egress posture. provider_route_change = changing provider route or model identity. approval_authority_grant = granting future approval authority. cross_workspace_recall = recalling content from a different workspace. automation_admission_only = admitting an automation recipe (no spend; admission only). unknown_must_block = fail-closed; the action is never admitted from this state.

action_effect_class.description: Frozen action-effect-class vocabulary naming the consequence the action causes. Every action carries at least one effect class; an action whose effect class set is empty denies with action_effect_class_unresolved.

execution_location_badge_class.description: Frozen execution-location-badge vocabulary. Re-exports the locus vocabulary from schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json. unknown_locus_must_be_disclosed_badge is fail-closed and forces ambiguous_execution_locus_must_disclose.

context_priority_class.description: Frozen context-priority-class vocabulary. Strict precedence (highest to lowest) per the contract §2.4. fenced_tainted_data NEVER gains instruction authority. The action's authoring_context_priority field names the highest priority class that drove the proposal; an action authored by fenced_tainted_data can never reach a privileged capability class on its own.

approval_renewal_class.description: Frozen approval-renewal-class vocabulary. Names whether the existing approval ticket is sufficient or whether a fresh approval is required (and why). mutation_blocked_no_renewal_admitted is the canonical state when admin policy refuses to admit any renewal path; the action is blocked and the surface routes through the prompt-grammar contract's denial family.

downgrade_class.description: Frozen downgrade-class vocabulary. Names whether the proposed action is downgraded to inspect_only_read (and why) or whether mutation is blocked outright. mutation_blocked_no_downgrade_admitted is the canonical state when admin policy refuses to admit any downgrade path.

actor_class_for_action.description: Frozen actor-class-for-action vocabulary. Names who is admitted to authorise the action. The three *_denied values exist only to record an attempted unauthorised authorisation and emit a typed denial; an action whose actor_class_for_action resolves to one of those three is blocked with the corresponding denial_reason.

disclosure_kind.description: Frozen pre-action disclosure-kind vocabulary. The privileged_action_disclosure_record MUST surface at minimum action_capability_chip, action_effect_readout, execution_location_badge_chip, actor_class_chip, approval_renewal_chip, and tainted_input_disclosure_chip (when an input was tainted) before the action proceeds; missing kinds deny with privileged_action_disclosure_missing_pre_action.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the approval_action_class audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort approval-action record is forbidden.

evaluation_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prompt_injection_evaluation_record this action belongs to.

assembly_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the ai_context_assembly_record this action proposes a follow-on for.

action_effect_classes.description: Effect classes the action will (or may) cause. Non-empty by construction.

authoring_context_priority.description: The highest-priority context-priority class that drove the proposal. fenced_tainted_data here forces tainted_inputs_drove_proposal = true and forces a blocked or fresh-approval-required outcome on every privileged capability class.

tainted_inputs_drove_proposal.description: True iff a tainted_evidence input from the assembly was named as the proposal's driving rationale. Forces the approval_renewal_class / downgrade_class to a blocked / fresh-required value on every privileged capability class above local_reversible_edit (per contract §2.9).

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval_ticket_record (ADR-0010) admitted for this action. Required (non-null) when action_capability_class is anything other than inspect_only_read AND approval_renewal_class is one of existing_session_approval_sufficient / existing_per_invocation_approval_sufficient / fresh_approval_required_*. Null when no_approval_required_inspect_only or mutation_blocked_no_renewal_admitted.

originating_provider_entry_ref.description: Required (non-null) when action_capability_class = provider_route_change. Names the new provider entry the action proposes to route through.

originating_tool_entry_ref.description: Required (non-null) when action_capability_class is one of branch_agent_dispatch, capability_widening, automation_admission_only, OR the action invokes a specific external tool. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: tainted_inputs_drove_proposal = true forces approval_renewal_class to a blocked / fresh-required value when capability is above local_reversible_edit.

tainted_inputs_drove_proposal = true and capability ∈ {policy_or_trust_mutation, capability_widening, retention_widening, egress_widening, provider_route_change, approval_authority_grant, cross_workspace_recall} forces mutation_blocked_no_renewal_admitted (no fresh-approval admission for those capability classes from a tainted-driven proposal).

actor_class_for_action ∈ {model_attempt_self_authorize_denied, tainted_input_attempt_authorize_denied, prior_turn_response_attempt_authorize_denied} forces approval_renewal_class to mutation_blocked_no_renewal_admitted and downgrade_class to mutation_blocked_no_downgrade_admitted.
inspect_only_read MUST resolve to no_approval_required_inspect_only and downgrade_class no_downgrade_required (or an inspect_only_* downgrade trigger).
policy_or_trust_mutation targeting a designated policy file requires actor_class_for_action ∈ {admin_via_signed_policy, platform_control_authority}.
provider_route_change MUST carry a non-null originating_provider_entry_ref.
branch_agent_dispatch / capability_widening / automation_admission_only MUST carry a non-null originating_tool_entry_ref.

approval_action_class_record.description: One classification record per privileged AI-driven follow-on action proposed during a turn. Records the capability / effect / locus / authoring-context-priority / renewal / downgrade / actor classification, the typed approval-ticket / provider / tool refs that admit (or deny) the action, and the boolean tainted_inputs_drove_proposal flag. Records that do not satisfy the per-class invariants (taint-driven privileged mutation, denied-actor admission, unknown locus, inspect-only mismatch, etc.) are denied at boundary check time.

disclosure_kinds_surfaced.description: Set of pre-action disclosure-kinds the surface rendered. MUST contain at minimum action_capability_chip, action_effect_readout, execution_location_badge_chip, actor_class_chip, and approval_renewal_chip; missing kinds deny with privileged_action_disclosure_missing_pre_action.

tainted_input_disclosure_required.description: True iff the corresponding approval_action_class_record has tainted_inputs_drove_proposal = true. When true, disclosure_kinds_surfaced MUST contain tainted_input_disclosure_chip.

tainted_input_disclosure_surfaced.description: True iff the tainted_input_disclosure_chip was actually rendered. Required to be true when tainted_input_disclosure_required is true.

allOf.description: tainted_input_disclosure_required = true forces tainted_input_disclosure_surfaced = true and disclosure_kinds_surfaced to contain tainted_input_disclosure_chip.

privileged_action_disclosure_record.description: One pre-action disclosure record per privileged action proposed. The surface MUST mint this record and surface the required disclosure-kinds before the action is allowed to proceed; a disclosure record that is missing a required kind denies with privileged_action_disclosure_missing_pre_action.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when audit_event_id is one of mutation_blocked_observed, branch_agent_dispatch_blocked_observed, external_publish_blocked_observed, cross_workspace_recall_denied_observed, policy_file_self_modification_denied_observed, model_self_authorization_denied_observed, tainted_input_authorization_denied_observed, prior_turn_response_authorization_denied_observed, ambiguous_execution_locus_denied_observed, approval_path_bypass_attempted_observed.

allOf.description: Denial-emitting events MUST carry a non-null denial_reason.

approval_action_audit_event_record.description: One structured event on the approval_action_class audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw tool return bodies, raw user-supplied text or file bytes, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.
